## Verification

- [ ] Rust formatting, Clippy, and tests
- [ ] UI typecheck, lint, tests, build, and npm audit
- [ ] Regression test added or not applicable with reason
- [ ] No secrets or private repository data in fixtures/logs
- [ ] Documentation and compatibility matrix updated when applicable
